calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-06-2003 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Petitioner, Jon Matthew Jackson in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Petitioner's request to change name and gender is denied without prejudice, no medical certificate.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-10-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Floyd Butler. Petitioner Jon Matthew Jackson having failed to provide proof of publication, the Court orders the matter off calendar.
